activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception not activated
Consignor allowed to deviate via explicit occurrence in invoice
Consignor land exact match after normalization
Consignee prioritized matching to invoice 'Consigned to' field
Consignee land exact match after normalization
Goods description verification by article number absence, fallback to text match
General goods description allowed with invoice reference
Quantity main verification by explicit numeric identification
Quantity verification by numeric match with decimal truncation allowed
Manual review triggered by missing quantity in invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'CENTRAL NATIONAL SWEDEN AB' from certificate matches invoice issuer 'Central National Sweden AB' with allowed normalization of case and corporate suffixes. Consignor located in Sweden in both documents with exact match after normalization. No conflicting names found in invoice.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'PALMCO SARL' in certificate matches invoice consignee 'Palmco SARL' exactly after normalization. Country 'DR CONGO' in certificate and 'DR Congo' in invoice match after case normalization. Consignee name found in invoice consignee field.

goods_description.invoice_value:
WTKL ref. Royal White Subs 160gsm, RW 1800mm, DIA 1250mm, Core 100mm
WTKL ref. Royal White Subs 160gsm, RW 1750mm, DIA 1250mm, Core 100mm
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'WHITE TOP KRAFT LINER' in certificate corresponds to 'WTKL ref. Royal White' in invoice lines indicating the same product type. Presence of invoice reference matching certificate (order no 9462) allows general goods description acceptance.

quantity.motivation: Quantity 49.865 Gross MT in certificate matches total weight quantity 49.865 MT in invoice exactly after allowed normalization. Units MT and Gross weight category are consistent between documents.

origin.motivation: Origin 'Sweden' in certificate matches explicit 'Country of Origin: Sweden' in invoice under shipping marks. EU origin normalization applies but here both documents specify Sweden exactly.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match between certificate and invoice with explicit and normalized textual agreement. No discrepancies found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet och fakturan stämmer överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell granskning.
